# Templates

Project templates for the Urbalurba developer platform.

## [Web Server Templates](web-server/)

Backend web server starter templates for multiple languages

| Template | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [C# Basic Webserver](web-server/csharp-basic-webserver.md) | ASP.NET Core server with health endpoint and Docker support |
| [Go Basic Webserver](web-server/golang-basic-webserver.md) | Go web server using net/http with health endpoint and Docker support |
| [Java Basic Webserver](web-server/java-basic-webserver.md) | Spring Boot server with health endpoint and Docker support |
| [PHP Basic Webserver](web-server/php-basic-webserver.md) | PHP web server using built-in server with health endpoint and Docker support |
| [Python Basic Webserver](web-server/python-basic-webserver.md) | Minimal Flask server with health endpoint and Docker support |
| [TypeScript Basic Webserver](web-server/typescript-basic-webserver.md) | Express.js server with TypeScript, health endpoint, and Docker support |

## [Web Application Templates](web-app/)

Frontend web application starter templates

| Template | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [Designsystemet Basic React App](web-app/designsystemet-basic-react-app.md) | React app with Designsystemet components, Vite, and TypeScript |

## [Workflow Templates](workflow/)

AI-assisted development workflow templates

| Template | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [Plan-Based AI Workflow](workflow/plan-based-workflow.md) | Structured AI development with plans, phases, and validation |
